title: Buttery Juicy Suet Croissant
description: This decadent croissant is infused with the richness of suet and cooked sous-vide for a tender texture, perfect as a crowd-pleasing keto-friendly breakfast or snack.

ingredients.name: Croissant dough
ingredients.notes: Make sure they are fresh and not frozen.

ingredients.name: Suet (vegetable shortening)
ingredients.notes: Use a non-dairy alternative if needed for dietary restrictions.

ingredients.name: Vegetable oil or neutral-flavored cooking oil

instructions: Mix the suet with the salted butter and egg yolk until smooth. Add a few drops of oil for better flow.
Dip each croissant piece into the suet mixture, coating evenly on all surfaces. Place them seam-side down in a shallow pan to preserve the shape.
Cook sous-vide at 85°C (185°F) for about 30 minutes or until fully cooked through. Ensure that they are not too dark as oil can burn easily at high temperatures.
Once cooled slightly, brush with egg wash and bake at 200°C (400°F) for about 10-15 minutes to achieve a golden crust on the outside and keep it soft inside.
